items.title: The Spurs-Thunder Western Conference Finals matchup shows exactly how far the Nuggets have fallen behind the NBA’s new elite. After a first-round playoff exit, serious questions now surround Nikola Jokic, Jamal Murray, Aaron Gordon, and the future of the Nuggets roster. Shap & AP
items.author: Jake Shapiro
items.body_excerpt: The Spurs-Thunder Western Conference Finals matchup shows exactly how far the Nuggets have fallen behind the NBA’s new elite. After a first-round playoff exit, serious questions now surround Nikola Jokic, Jamal Murray, Aaron Gordon, and the future of the Nuggets roster. Shap & AP break it down
